column4: Priority Notes
Justified Spendings - Absolute Priority Relics
column5: These relics are aimed to help in you most all-around content as possible

column4: Required for the PvP dominance, an absolute priority whenever it shows up.
Less powerful in PvP than the Tree but still great nonetheless. Slightly stronger in PvE than the Tree.
Should stay at below 5-stars due to negative damage at above (unless spender). Should be your first relic to 2-stars.
PvE Powerhouse, PvP Monarch Killer. Pick it up as fast as possible to 2-stars.
Solid in the PvP but a must have in the Lost City for sustain
column5: Last Week of the Season In the Relic Rebate

column4: Top tier in PvP + PvE, as many DPS heroes are Demons, this relic just performs miracles, even out-doing the Sarcophagus at times. Get it after your Babylon becomes online (8/9-stars)
Rebates & Extra Sources
column5: These relics are mostly for the PvP but are also helpful in PvE

column4: A 2-star counter to Lucifer's stat steal and Corrode. At above is great for damage boost by Radiance and instant cast at 9-stars, pick up when you need a "counter" to Lucifer (doing PvP).
3-stars for PvE although it has been irrelevant for a while. 6 -> 8-stars for the PvP destruction. Not sure if it's worthy of building up to 6/8-stars as F2P.
column5: Last Week of the Season In the Relic Rebate

column4: Best relic when it comes to attacking side for PvP, entirely disrupts the relic energy of the opponent's team. If you care for PvP, this relic will be a must.
Cheap & Effective, don't get from the Rebate, get from other sources.
It's best when paired with a 3-round Chrono relic for max increase in the combo actions from your allies. Worth picking up when you've done the above relics.
Just needs 2-stars for a full current round immunity (the round it casts). Get it when going for PvP.
Get it once you've some free time, overall works at 3 but is weird to use, perfect at 5 and 7. Mainly used for the Speed advantage and Ultimates in R1.
Not too big of a priority, but it's pretty fair relic both PvP and PvE wise. Exceptional in the Crusades that are during 2nd and 6th week of the season.
Extras/Rebates - PvP Road
column5: When you start doing PvP as the PvE contest vanishes

column4: PvP beast, 3-round cooldown reset, Seal being the most broken debuff, absolutely worth going for Ethereals or Mystifiers.
Strong but requires 7-stars and ideally pairing with the Planar Gate. Not recommended unless you can get it fast to 7.
A key relic for the Dooms, work on it simultaneously as you're building your Dooms team.
